---
title: "Carbon Pulse"
page-layout: article
---

# Carbon Pulse

## Description

News and intelligence platform covering carbon markets, emissions trading, greenhouse gas pricing, climate policy, and sustainability initiatives. Supports environmental economics and climate governance research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Energy & Environment, Business & Economics, Government & Public Policy
- **Data/resource type:** News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** News & Current Events, ESG & Sustainability Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires users to register for an individual account with a Yale email address for access.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-carbon-pulse)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
